283 I2000_PNEUMO_CD I2000_PNEUMO_CD I2000 Active Diagnoses: Pneumonia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of pneumonia in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
284 I2100_SPTCMIA_CD I2100_SPTCMIA_CD I2100 Active Diagnoses: Septicemia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of septicemia in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no
